system.description: When a mundane target is upset, angry, or hostile toward you, tell them “It’s my birthday!” and roll [quality].

outcomes.success:
the target instantly
relaxes and develops a neutral or mildly
positive opinion toward you, regardless
of their previous opinion. They don’t
view you as a threat, or as a source of
any kind of trouble…until tomorrow.
outcomes.every3rd3:
you can say “It’s
their birthday, too!” and gesture
at someone nearby. They are also
discounted as a threat by the target.
outcomes.triscendence:
it is everyone’s birthday.
The target is unable to be hostile or
aggressive toward anyone at all, anywhere.
outcomes.failure:
the target is even more
certain you’re a threat. Even worse, it is
their birthday and they are extremely
lucky. Harm or inconvenience directed
towards them will tend to miss or fail to
find purchase. Observers and passers-
by will go out of their way to assist
them and intervene on their behalf.
This effect lasts until the next day.
